summary: Iteration 20: Complete v1 API rebuild testing - ALL BACKEND TESTS PASSED (12/12), ALL FRONTEND TESTS PASSED. Verified new v1 API surface (/api/v1/health, /models, /a0/prompt, /a0/history, /keys, /edcm/eval) and full frontend functionality (auth, chat, settings).
critical_code_review_comments: New v1 API surface correctly implemented - all routes prefixed with /api/v1/
Auth routes remain at /api/auth/ as expected
SSE streaming via fetch works correctly for /api/v1/a0/prompt/stream
emergentintegrations library properly integrated for OpenAI/Anthropic/Google models
httpx used for OpenAI-compatible APIs (xAI, DeepSeek, Perplexity)
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY configured in backend/.env and working
Thread history persists correctly in MongoDB
Response panels show model name, response time, copy/thumbsup/thumbsdown buttons
Developer tabs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, DeepSeek, Perplexity) all visible with model checkboxes
Settings page has API Keys and Model Registry tabs working correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing test account testbot01 created via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is iteration 20 after complete app rebuild. The v1 API is fully tested and working. Backend uses /api/v1/ prefix for new routes, /api/auth/ for auth. Frontend uses SSE streaming via fetch for real-time LLM responses. Test account testbot01/test123456 has multiple threads. All Emergent-supported models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) use universal EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. xAI, DeepSeek, Perplexity require user-provided keys.

details.auth_login_success: PASS - Returns access_token and user object
details.health_check: PASS - Returns status:ok and build version
details.models_list: PASS - Returns 6 developers with their models
details.keys_status: PASS - Returns key status for all 6 developers
details.history_endpoint: PASS - Returns thread list with pagination
details.prompt_single: PASS - Single model call works with auth
details.thread_messages: PASS - Gets messages for specific thread

frontend_auth_tests.details: Login page loads, form fills, redirects to /chat on success

details.model_selector: 6 developer tabs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, DeepSeek, Perplexity)
details.developer_expansion: GPT-4o-mini checkbox visible after expanding OpenAI tab
details.prompt_send: Successfully sent prompt and received response
details.response_panel: Shows model name, response time (0.5s), copy/thumbsup/thumbsdown buttons
details.thread_sidebar: Thread list visible, clicking thread loads its messages

details.api_keys_tab: Shows 6 developers with status (Universal Key or Not configured)
details.model_registry_tab: Shows all developers with their models and +Add Model buttons

mocked_apis.details: All LLM calls are real using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for Emergent-supported models

features_verified: Chat page renders: prompt input, developer tabs, send button
Expand developer tab shows model checkboxes
Send prompt with gpt-4o-mini - response appears in panel
Response panel shows model name, response time, copy/thumbsup/thumbsdown
Thread appears in sidebar after sending prompt
Click existing thread in sidebar loads its messages
Settings page: API Keys and Model Registry tabs work
Backend: POST /api/v1/a0/prompt with auth returns responses
Backend: POST /api/v1/a0/prompt-single with auth returns single response
